name: IdsEdwMaraClnclClsFMAExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MAIN_DATA AS (SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_ID,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.EFF_DT_SK,COALESCE(CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD,'@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.TERM_DT_SK,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_DESC,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_TX,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,3 AS ORDER_COL FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.@{pipeline().parameters.MaraClnclClsTable} AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD_MPPNG ON MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD_MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK>=@{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD='MEDINSIGHTSMA' AND MARA_CLNCL_CLS.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK<>1 AND MARA_CLNCL_CLS.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK<>0),NA_ROW AS (SELECT 1 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID,'1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK,'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD,'1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK,'NA' AS AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,'NA' AS AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_DESC,'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_TX,'NA' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,'NA' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,'NA' AS SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,1 AS ORDER_COL),UNK_ROW AS (SELECT 0 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID,'1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK,'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD,'1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK,'UNK' AS AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,'UNK' AS AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_DESC,'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_TX,'UNK' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,'UNK' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,'UNK' AS SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,2 AS ORDER_COL) SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,CLNCL_CLS_ID,EFF_DT_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,TERM_DT_SK,AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_TX,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM NA_ROW UNION ALL SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,CLNCL_CLS_ID,EFF_DT_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,TERM_DT_SK,AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_TX,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM UNK_ROW UNION ALL SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK,CLNCL_CLS_ID,EFF_DT_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,TERM_DT_SK,AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM,AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID,CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC,CLNCL_CLS_TX,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID,PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC,SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM MAIN_DATA ORDER BY ORDER_COL
